matched_class_path: gene modification or gain of function
primary_variables.matched_definition: Base or amino-acid substitution (for example SNV, point mutation, engineered missense).
evidence: To identify acetylation-dependent posttranslational modifications (PTMs) of G6PD, site-specifically acetylated and Flag-tagged G6PD was expressed in HEK293T cells by genetically encoding the incorporation of acetylated lysine in response to an in-frame TAG stop codon.
K403-acetylated G6PD (sample) and K414-acetylated G6PD (control) were co-expressed with WT Fyn kinase and a catalytically inactive mutant of Fyn (FynDN).

base_candidates_ranked.reason: Data acquired using Q Exactive Plus with repetitively full MS scans followed by HCD of the ten most dominant ions (Top10 DDA). Semi-quantitation was performed using XIC peak areas of peptides.

modifier_candidates_ranked.reason: The experiment specifically investigates Fyn-dependent phosphorylation of G6PD (Y401, Y503) and includes phosphorylation as a variable modification.
The core of the study is site-specific acetylation of G6PD using genetic code expansion, and acetylation is listed as a variable modification.
